title: T-002 — scanner_audit_log + scanner_devices migration (06-a)
prompt:
# T-002 — scanner_audit_log + scanner_devices migration

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §5.3 retention, §8.1 FR-SC-BE-012, §8.1 FR-SC-FE-004b SCN-013 Devices
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land the high-volume `scanner_audit_log` table (30-day retention) and the `scanner_devices` fleet table (powering SCN-013), both with RLS and ADR-028 schema-driven extension column.

## Implementation contract
1. Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0061_scanner_audit_and_devices.sql`:
   - scanner_audit_log (id BIGSERIAL PK, org_id UUID, user_id UUID, site_id UUID NULL, line_id UUID NULL, session_id UUID NULL, timestamp TIMESTAMPTZ default now, barcode TEXT, scan_type TEXT, scan_method TEXT CHECK IN ('hardware','camera','manual'), device_type TEXT, result TEXT CHECK IN ('success','error','warn','info'), error_code TEXT NULL, ip_address INET, client_operation_id UUID NULL, metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', ext_jsonb JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', schema_version INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1).
   - Indexes: (org_id, timestamp DESC), (org_id, user_id, timestamp DESC), (org_id, barcode), btree (client_operation_id) WHERE client_operation_id IS NOT NULL.
   - scanner_devices (id UUID PK, org_id UUID, site_id UUID, device_type TEXT, device_label TEXT, pairing_token UUID NULL, paired_user_id UUID NULL, last_seen_at TIMESTAMPTZ, battery_pct INT NULL CHECK 0..100, status TEXT CHECK IN ('online','offline','low_battery'), default_line_id UUID NULL, ext_jsonb JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}').
   - RLS on both tables (tenant_isolation_scanner_audit_log, tenant_isolation_scanner_devices) keyed on org_id.
2. Drizzle schemas `scanner-audit-log.ts` + `scanner-devices.ts`.
3. Note (comment in SQL): retention cron is added in a separate ops task; DDL only here.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0061_scanner_audit_and_devices.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scanner-audit-log.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scanner-devices.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/scanner-audit-and-devices.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0061 ran, when describing scanner_audit_log, then all four indexes exist and RLS is enabled with tenant_isolation_scanner_audit_log
2. Given migration 0061 ran, when describing scanner_devices, then status CHECK constraint allows only online/offline/low_battery and battery_pct CHECK enforces 0..100
3. Given two orgs each insert audit rows, when querying under org A app.org_id, then no org B rows are returned

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/scanner-audit-and-devices.test.ts asserting indexes, CHECK constraints, RLS isolation
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test scanner-audit-and-devices'

## Risk red lines
- Do not point retention cleanup at the main audit_log table (separate retention)
- Do not omit ext_jsonb (ADR-028 backbone)
- Do not skip RLS on either table

pipeline_inputs.description: Create scanner_audit_log (30d retention table) + scanner_devices fleet table with RLS + ext_jsonb backbone.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0061 emits both tables per PRD §5.3+§8.1. scanner_audit_log carries four indexes + ext_jsonb for ADR-028. scanner_devices powers SCN-013 admin screen (KPI/online/battery/pairing). RLS is org_id-scoped on both. Tests verify indexes, CHECK constraints, and tenant isolation.
out_of_scope: Do not write the retention cron job here
Do not add audit ingestion endpoint here (T-011)
Do not implement SCN-013 UI here (T-022)
